text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japanese Derby, and Tokyo
Racecourse is getting really heated up.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She's number one in the popularity ranks for a
reason! She's on a winning streak of graded races,
so I think she's definitely got this!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Oh, you sweet summer child. Trying to follow in your parents' footsteps is a huuuge motivator! That's why my favorite's going to win!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Wow.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I can really feel how much everyone cares about
the runners they're cheering for.
choice_data_list: The spectators have dreams for the Derby too.
The spectators have dreams for the Derby too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's right... Flash was saying that it's special. I
guess this is what she meant.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Hey, darling. Why isn't this "Eishin Flash"
popular? She's really good, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text:
Because the other runners are much better,
honey. There's no denying that she's good, but
she's got no hope against this competition. For
example...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Go, Flash! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, once the race starts, everyone's
expectations are turned on their heads. The
runner who breaks through the chaos of the
homestretch is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Eishin Flash! Eishin Flash has taken the lead!
She's holding onto it, aaand... she crosses the
finish line!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Carrying the cheers of thousands, this year's
Derby Champion is... Eishin Flash!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Eishin Flaaasssh!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That was... amazing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home from the race, I grow a little
concerned with how quiet Curren Chan is, so we
stop by a park.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...I've been working so hard on my social media
presence lately that you've been worried about
me, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...I've been working so hard on my social media
presence lately that you've been worried about
me, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm okay. Really. The truth is, I was feeling a tiny
bit... insecure... I guess.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if it's really a good idea to just focus
on sprints. Like, I won't get much attention unless
I do a lot of extra work outside of racing...
choice_data_list: Because not many people watch sprints?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Basically, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I understand her concerns. Even if there are some
popular and exciting sprints...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Compared to the Classic races like the Triple
Crown tour, they don't get much media coverage,
and they don't get anywhere near the same
attention from fans either.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's why I was thinking... If I can stand out a
whole bunch, it'd be good promotion for the
races.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I figured if I could charm people with my cuteness
and get them hooked on watching my races,
everything would be solved just like that! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But, of course, it's not that easy. I saw that at
today's race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I can never draw that amount of passion from
people the way I am now.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Flash had such a pure smile on her face today... It
was beyond cute.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That smile resonated with me. It was just like the
shock I felt the first time I watched a race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I want that kind of passion, and to find my cuteness at its end.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But... does my running linger in people's hearts
like what we saw today?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: At the very least... it doesn't linger in mine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She speaks firmly, and I can see frustration
seeping into her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
With the way things are now, no matter how many
people watch my races, I'm never gonna be the
most beloved runner.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I have to change. I have to be... the cutest me I
can be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this point, it's not possible to frame what
Curren Chan wants in terms of an actual goal...
But one thing's for sure...
choice_data_list: You'll just have to get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash won and proved herself to everyone.
Only winners are worthy of calling themselves the
best.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...You're right.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okay. Then, I'm gonna get stronger! Let's hit the
track!
choice_data_list: You want to train right now?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okay. Then, I'm gonna get stronger! Let's hit the
track!
choice_data_list: You want to train right now?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta push myself to the very limit if I'm
gonna get stronger. I need to train!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her phrasing makes me think of something.
choice_data_list: I've got the perfect way to train.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's almost summer. The Classics are over for the
time being, and it's the season for runners to work
on improvement.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Ahhh. So we take advantage of the time when
everyone's exposure is relatively low to run races
and build experience, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay, sure! This summer, I'm getting even cuter!
choice_data_list: First up is the Hakodate Sprint Stakes!
First up is the Hakodate Sprint Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, we set our next goal as the first
race of the Summer Sprint Series—the Hakodate
Sprint Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's decided, then! We're going to Hakodate for
my special training—Operation "Eat Seafood Till
You Drop"!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Just kidding. Ehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait. One day, everything I ever
wanted... will be mine!
